exa-web-search.description: Web search for code, errors, and best practices — powers Spec-First research

context7.description: Live documentation lookup — prevents hallucination in Spec-First phase

mcp-language-server.description: Local LSP diagnostics — CDD compile verification core

memory.description: Persistent memory across sessions — continuous learning support

sequential-thinking.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning — mandatory for CDD compile error analysis

_comments.philosophy: CDD + Spec-First: 5 core MCPs only. Research → Spec → Code → Compile → Done.
_comments.usage: Copy the servers you need to your project's opencode.jsonc or ~/.config/opencode/
_comments.env_vars: Set EXA_API_KEY in your environment for exa-web-search
